content.text:
<output>{
  "themeMovement": [
    { "theme": "service", "delta": 3, "direction": "up" },
    { "theme": "product_quality", "delta": 2, "direction": "up" }
  ],
  "topPatterns": [
    {
      "patternId": "reinforce-named-staff-shoutout",
      "title": "Shout out the named staff member in the team channel",
      "tailoredBody": "Two Reviewers this week named a specific staff member positively — share the quotes (anonymising the Reviewer) in the team channel and reference them at the next 1-on-1.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-pos-1", "starRating": 5, "redactedQuote": "The team are wonderful — [REVIEWER] always remembers my order.", "themes": ["service", "staff_attitude"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "reinforce-share-on-storefront",
      "title": "Pin the strongest Review of the week to your storefront",
      "tailoredBody": "You have a detailed 5-star Review praising the pastries and the morning team. Pin it to your Google profile and link to it from your website — a recent specific positive Review is worth more than ten generic five-stars.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-pos-2", "starRating": 5, "redactedQuote": "Best bakery in town. Pastries are perfect and the morning team is brilliant.", "themes": ["product_quality", "service"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "reinforce-replicate-the-good-shift",
      "title": "Identify what was different about the praised shift",
      "tailoredBody": "The positive Reviews this week cluster on Saturday morning shifts. List who was on, what was prepped, what was different — replicating a good shift is more reliable than fixing a bad one.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-pos-3", "starRating": 5, "redactedQuote": "Saturday morning visit was perfect — quick service and great coffee.", "themes": ["service", "wait_time"] }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "overallTone": "celebrate"
}</output>
